title: Denmark Says It Will Defend ‘Every Inch’ of NATO as Trump Eyes Greenland Again
summary_full: After President Trump once more said that the island should be under U.S. control, the Danish prime minister, Mette Frederiksen, told reporters, “We will defend the kingdom of Denmark.”
summary_public: After President Trump once more said that the island should be under U.S. control, the Danish prime minister, Mette Frederiksen, told reporters, “We will defend the kingdom of Denmark.”

DK.label: positive
